prompt: Prayer for pre-flight blessing of bike squadron
prayer:
From the Litany of Swift Passage, Verse II

First: Anoint the fuel-spirits with sacred oils, that they flow true to the combustion-hearts.
Second: Invoke the ignition-servos with the Rite of Turning, engaging starter-mechanisms in sequence.
Third: Let the wheel-spirits spin, testing suspension-sanctity and brake-responsiveness.
Fourth: Commend the machines to the Omnissiah's guidance, that their riders return victorious.

prompt: Prayer for blessing a lasgun power cell before insertion
prayer:
Blessed be the energy-spirit's containment.

First: Inspect the cell-casing for fractures and profane corruption.
Second: Align the contact-terminals with the weapon-receptacle, invoking conductivity-sanctity.
Third: Seat the cell with reverent pressure, binding machine-spirit to machine-spirit.
Fourth: Test the luminous discharge, that accuracy be blessed by the Omnissiah.

prompt: Prayer for arming a motion detector in defensive position
prayer:
From the Codex Vigilantiae, Section III

First: Clear the sensor-lens of dust and profane obscuration.
Second: Engage the power-coupling, awakening the detection-spirit from dormancy.
Third: Set the sensitivity-threshold to prescribed parameters, that false-alarms be banished.
Fourth: Activate the warning-beacon, commending this vigilant machine to the Omnissiah's eternal watch.

prompt: First-use blessing for a newly reset circuit breaker
prayer:
Rite of Restoration, freshly consecrated.

First: Verify the breaker-switch rests in neutral sanctity, unengaged.
Second: Apply ritual voltage-test to confirm the circuit-spirit's wholeness.
Third: Engage the breaker-mechanism slowly, invoking the Omnissiah's protection against surge and flame.
Fourth: Let current flow anew, that this device guard against catastrophe forevermore.

prompt: Post-repair consecration rite for a bolter weapon
prayer:
Blessed be the hammer-spirit's return to service.

First: Inspect the bolt-feed mechanism, ensuring all components mate in sacred alignment.
Second: Charge the firing-chamber with a single round, testing the breech-seal's integrity.
Third: Discharge the consecration-round into the proving-ground, that accuracy be restored.
Fourth: By the Omnissiah's mercy, let this weapon strike true once more.

prompt: Emergency ignition rite for Rhino APC in combat situation
prayer:
From the Litany of Urgent Necessity, unabbreviated.

First: Prime the fuel-injectors with the Rite of Forcing, flooding the combustion-chambers.
Second: Invoke the starter-motor with maximum force, that the engine-spirit awaken in fury.
Third: Engage the transmission immediately upon ignition, binding drive-train to drive-train.
Fourth: Let the machine's wrath carry us to victory, or to honored death.

prompt: Prayer for aligning star charts before combat operations
prayer:
Rite of Celestial Concordance, pre-battle invocation.

First: Clear the chart-reader's optical lens of all obscuration and profane dust.
Second: Align the astral-compass to magnetic-true, invoking the Emperor's Light upon navigation-systems.
Third: Cross-reference the position-stars with the targeting-cogitator, binding heaven to earth.
Fourth: Commend our trajectory to the Omnissiah, that we strike where we aim.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for inspection of machine-wear components
prayer:
From the Litany of Preservation, cyclical rite.

First: Examine all friction-surfaces for erosion and profane degradation.
Second: Measure wear-patterns against the template-sacred, noting deviations.
Third: Apply restorative lubricants to joints and pivots, that motion be smoothed.
Fourth: Document findings in the machine's history-log, honoring the Omnissiah's eternal record.

prompt: Post-repair consecration for inspection of worn bearings and seals
prayer:
Blessed be the restored machine-spirit's integrity.

First: Remove the old seal-material with careful ritual, freeing trapped decay.
Second: Install new bearing-components with precision-blessed, ensuring perfect geometric alignment.
Third: Apply sacramental grease to all surfaces, binding new parts to purpose.
Fourth: Spin the assembly freely, confirming the Omnissiah's will is satisfied.

prompt: Prayer for loading ammunition into artillery during combat preparation
prayer:
From the Rite of Righteous Bombardment, Verse VII.

First: Verify the breech-chamber is clear and sanctified, free of prior explosive residue.
Second: Load the projectile-spirit with ceremonial care, seating it in the firing-chamber's heart.
Third: Engage the lock-mechanism, binding ammunition to cannon with sacred force.
Fourth: Prime the firing-system, commending this instrument of wrath to the Omnissiah's judgment.
